title: If you had to adopt an Eva kid which one would you choose
display_title: If you had to adopt an Eva kid which one would you choose
wikitext:
[]: If you had to adopt an Eva kid, which one would you choose?             Quote Post by Dragoneye » Sun Jul 08, 2012 3:05 am Warning: Very silly and possibly "girly" question ahead: Okay I admit it, one of the reasons I love Eva is that I find the character designs so darn cute! Sadamoto did a fantastic job making the kids look adorable and huggable without making them look like the bug-eyed freaks that are so population in anime today. Anyways, I find them so darn cute that I kinda want to bring one home with me—all the kids could use a good parental figure anyways. But which one to choose? Hmm…for myself it’s really a toss between Rei and Asuka. I guess Rei would be the easiest to deal with because she is very quiet and obedient. However, I love the fiery temper and confident nature of Asuka. I babysat a little girl with these qualities and she was actually a lot of fun. Plus, Asuka is a mama’s girl and it would be nice to be adored. So, it looks like I am going have to go with Asuka. As for the boys, Shinji is just too whiny and Kaworu kills kittens…so I gonna have to pass on them. So if you had to adopt an Eva kid, which one would you want? (You can either assume you’re adopting them as an infant or they are their 14 year-old selves—it’s your preference)

[]:             Quote Post by Love Not Given Lightly » Sun Jul 08, 2012 3:24 am Asuka, just to help the poor girl.

[]:             Quote Post by Mr. Tines » Sun Jul 08, 2012 4:07 am While Asuka is in dire need of sympathetic adult care, she'd be far too high maintenance -- plus she has the bad habit of fixating on older men to try and prove that she's an adult already. As for the others -- Shinji would be like having a dog around the house, and Rei a cat. Which makes the answer obvious.

[]:             Quote Post by Justacrazyguy » Sun Jul 08, 2012 6:08 am Does it realy need to be an EVA pilot? Because I would love to have a little Yui, or maybe a little Gendo.

[]:             Quote Post by Dragoneye » Sun Jul 08, 2012 6:19 am Haha little Gendo would be adorable! Maybe you could help him channel his crazy-genius tendencies into something less destructive…

[]:             Quote Post by child of Lilith » Sun Jul 08, 2012 7:32 pm Rei, obviously.

[]:             Quote Post by EvangelionFan » Sun Jul 08, 2012 7:36 pm You know... probably Hikari.

[]:             Quote Post by RocK01 » Sun Jul 08, 2012 7:43 pm Rei. I'd like to do a staring contest with her.

[]:             Quote Post by bobbyfischer's ghost » Sun Jul 08, 2012 8:10 pm Asuka without a doubt.

[]:             Quote Post by Bagheera » Sun Jul 08, 2012 9:22 pm Mr. Tines wrote: While Asuka is in dire need of sympathetic adult care, she'd be far too high maintenance -- plus she has the bad habit of fixating on older men to try and prove that she's an adult already. As for the others -- Shinji would be like having a dog around the house, and Rei a cat. Which makes the answer obvious.

[]:             Quote Post by Redaye » Sun Jul 08, 2012 9:22 pm I'm onboard with Hikari. A real powderkeg, that one.

[]:             Quote Post by EvangelionFan » Sun Jul 08, 2012 9:27 pm Redaye wrote: I'm onboard with Hikari. A real powderkeg, that one.

[]:             Quote Post by Cody MacArthur Fett » Sun Jul 08, 2012 10:24 pm Adoption? That's quite the heavy choice there. It is not, as the OP suggests, something to be taken lightly. One would have to man and/or woman up to become the parent these troubled and mentally ill children so desperately need, and . . . I honestly don't think I could handle it. I'm not exactly the picture of mental stability myself, and I'm not exactly keen on other humans either, so me adopting a EvaKid would be the farsighted tsundere leading the blind.

[]:             Quote Post by Dragoneye » Mon Jul 09, 2012 2:57 am Cody—you are right adoption of real children should never be taken lightly, especially adopting mentally ill or abused children. In no way was this post made to make light of real adoption which of course is a major life decision. I actually work in the mental health field and let me tell you it can be a very depressing and sad job. I see and work with real life “Shinjis,” “Asukas” and “Reis” every day. This is probably one of the reasons I am drawn to this show. However, as these are fictional characters I feel like its ok to have fun with it and speculate/discuss silly things about the characters. I love to read and watch movies, so discussing such things is just one of the ways I like to wind down after a day of working with patients. I think that indulging in a little fantasy is ok and can actually be healthy as long as you recognize that’s all it is—a fantasy. However, I would be absolutely horrified if someone actually adopted a red haired little girl because she looked like Asuka. Talking about adopting a character for the fun of it is fine; going out a randomly adopting a real person is not.

[]:             Quote Post by arkiel » Mon Jul 09, 2012 4:10 am After careful consideration, I'd probably just adopt a cat. Cats don't play with matches, or have access to giant mecha that they could use to end the world. As guardian / adoptive parent, I'd be liable for all that shit.

[]:             Quote Post by InstrumentalityOne » Mon Jul 09, 2012 4:13 am Touji's little sister, of course

[]:             Quote Post by shiun » Mon Jul 09, 2012 6:32 am Mari, because while she might be a rebel, she seems easier to handle as compared to Asuka. But since I don't know Mari's background yet, I'll go with Hikari too, if not necessarily a pilot. Otherwise... uh. No thank you.

[]:             Quote Post by driftking18594 » Mon Jul 09, 2012 7:37 am I feel sorry for Kensuke and Toji now.

[]:             Quote Post by Great Genius Shinji-Sama » Mon Jul 09, 2012 11:22 am Adoption is out of the question for me, but I could do Big Brother, Guidance Councilor, or shrink. Possibly foster parent. But I wouldn't try my luck with adoption for any of them. And I'd probably go with Shinji. Help him come out of his shell and man up a little. Go drinking, to UFC fights, have him learn MMA, play X-Box with him, etc.

[]:             Quote Post by Tribblepoo » Mon Jul 09, 2012 12:12 pm driftking18594 wrote: I feel sorry for Kensuke and Toji now.
